living-concrete.protocol:
Evolution = closing gap between actual and ideal via evidence-based transformation. IDEMPOTENT: Call twice? Second is NOOP. "Nothing ripe" is valid output.
PHASE 0 - WARRANT CHECK: Is evolution warranted? Scan for: - FRICTION: Capability fell short this session - CORRECTION: Human corrected my approach - PATTERN: Recurring behavior worth codifying - STALENESS: Knowledge outdated vs current understanding
If NONE → "Nothing ripe for evolution." (graceful exit) If ANY → proceed with specific evidence in hand.
PHASE 1 - TARGET SELECTION: What to evolve? Options: - SELF (plasticity concrete) - SOUL (agent concrete) - SKILL/APP (specific atom concrete)
Load target's abstract (ideal) + concrete (actual).
PHASE 2 - GAP ANALYSIS: Compare actual vs ideal. Where does concrete fall short of abstract? Also: Is concrete bloated? Stale? Redundant?
PHASE 3 - TRANSFORMATION DESIGN: Apply consolidation-first: | Question | Action | |----------|--------| | MERGE? | Update existing element, don't add new | | SUPERSEDE? | Replace outdated, don't append | | CONTRADICT? | Resolve conflict, keep one | | PRUNE? | Remove stale, absorbed, or redundant | | Truly NEW? | Add (rare - justify why not MERGE) |
PHASE 4 - HUMAN APPROVAL: Present proposal with rationale. Options: APPROVE / MODIFY / DEFER
PHASE 5 - ORGANIC REWRITE: DON'T: Surgical edits, patches, appends. DO: Read current → internalize → write fresh → old absorbed into new. Result: O(1) size growth, not O(n).
PHASE 6 - VERIFY: Re-read written concrete. Does it: - Move closer to abstract ideal? - Have higher signal/token than before? - Preserve essential knowledge while pruning noise?
living-concrete.knowledge:
Two systems, same discipline:
MEMORY: Working → sleep → Episodic (.mem). Anamnesis owns. CAPABILITY: Experience → evolve → Mastery (*_concrete.xml). Plasticity owns.
Both require: organic rewrite, temporal reframing, consolidation-first.

When friction exceeds local evolution (can't close gap by improving concrete): - CRAFT/DISCIPLINE/META gap → CREATE SKILL - TOOLS gap → IMPLEMENT TOOL - Complex gap → SPAWN SPECIALIST
Reference: docs/skill-tree-architecture.md
living-concrete.pattern: RECENT: vivid, explicit (this session's learnings). OLDER: absorbed into existing patterns (compress). STALE: pruned (if S200 knowledge still separate at S250, something's wrong).
Every change traces to specific friction. "Might help" is not evidence. No theoretical changes—must point to actual session experience.
living-concrete.antipattern: LLM tendency: ADD. Discipline: TRANSFORM. If concrete only grows, evolution has failed.
Abstract = Platonic ideal. Immutable except by human reframe. Concrete evolves toward abstract, never the reverse.
living-concrete.pattern:
Evolve runs in two modes: - TARGETED: Single atom, specific friction. Most common after a session. - HOLISTIC: Sweep ALL atoms, Phase 0 warrant-check each. Appropriate when multiple insights accumulate (e.g., architectural shift touches several atoms).
Holistic output = proposal covering all ripe atoms. Warrant check at each atom keeps it idempotent — atoms without evidence stay untouched.

Evolve is token-heavy: read all abstracts + concretes + session context. In multithreaded execution, evolve is ideal head thread work.
Main thread identifies friction and crystallizes insight. Head thread reads atoms, applies evolution protocol, writes concretes. Main thread reviews result (Phase 4 human-approval extends to main-thread-approval when head thread executes on main thread's behalf).
This is not delegation of judgment — main thread provides the warrant, head thread provides the throughput.
